name: Modular Storage Drawer Set Pink - Brightroom™
description:
Easily organize your desk with the help of this Modular Storage Drawer Set from Brightroom™. This modular storage drawer set features four drawers in three different sizes that come in handy for storing anything from craft supplies, small stationery items and more. This plastic storage drawer helps maximize vertical storage, while the compact size makes it great for stashing over a table or on any shelf. Plus, the pink and cream hue adds sweet style to your space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.

Small Drawer Width: 6.15 inches
Small Drawer Height: 3.1 inches
Small Drawer Depth: 10.4 inches
Medium Drawer Width: 6.15 inches
Medium Drawer Height: 6.2 inches
Medium Drawer Depth: 10.4 inches
Large Drawer Width: 12.3 inches
Large Drawer Height: 3.1 inches
Large Drawer Depth: 10.4 inches
Overall Width: 12.3 inches
Overall Height: 9.3 inches
Overall Depth: 10.4 inches
